testcase.name: The_virtual_machine_is_loaded._

error.message: Error in `f(init, x[[i]])`: is.request(y) is not TRUE ('test-_-vm-test.R:29:5')

testcase.error: Error in `f(init, x[[i]])`: is.request(y) is not TRUE Backtrace: x 1. \-httr::HEAD(...) at test-_-vm-test.R:29:5 2. \-httr:::request_build("HEAD", hu$url, config, ...) 3. \-base::Reduce(request_combine, extra, init = request()) 4. \-httr (local) f(init, x[[i]]) 5. \-base::stopifnot(is.request(x), is.request(y))
